description: You are a VFX supervisor on a historical epic film about the Battle of Trafalgar (October 21, 1805). Document the sky as seen from offshore Cape Trafalgar (36.18°N, 6.03°W, altitude 0m) on October 21, 1805, at 20:00 UTC with atmosphere enabled, ground disabled, constellation artwork visible, the azimuthal coordinate grid active, and cardinal direction labels shown. Save screenshots of the Moon, Jupiter, and a wide-field view of the sky to /home/ga/Desktop/ and record the positions of the Moon and Jupiter in a reference file at /home/ga/Desktop/trafalgar_sky_notes.txt.

metadata.data_source: Geographic coordinates of Cape Trafalgar, Spain; Gregorian calendar date
